title: Lord Sharpe of Epsom - Parliamentary Under Secretary, Home Office - advice under the government's Business Appointment Rules
body: "Advisor, Vindo Technology Limited  Lord Sharpe received advice on taking up a paid role with Vindo Technology Limited,  This advice was considered and provided by ACOBA before it closed on 12 October 2025. The Independent Adviser has not had a role in determining this advice.  ACOBA published on its website advice provided to Lord Sharpe before its closure. "
